//: Copy to mithra.config.json (gitignored) and edit. Every key is optional.
//both: One file drives both surfaces: the GUI (npm start) and the MCP server (npm run mcp).
//appName: GUI only. Window title and the name in the header.
//theme: GUI only. See ui/public/themes.css for what ships.
//host: GUI only. Keep it on 127.0.0.1: the embedded terminal launches a real Claude CLI.
//claudeBin: GUI only. 'auto' looks up claude on PATH; or give an absolute path.
//skills: GUI only. The chips above the terminal. Each one types its cmd into the prompt.
//root: Where your projects live — relative to this folder, or absolute. MITHRA_DOCS overrides it.
//tasksFile: Cross-project checklist at the root of `root`. Parsed as ## Status -> ### Project -> - [ ] item.
//manualTaskMarkers: A task containing one of these is flagged as a manual action of yours (not delegable).
//docFiles: GUI only. Per-project docs the Docs tab knows how to render (whitelist).
//workingMemory: GUI only. A short, hand-curated memory file at the root of `root`, with a size cap.
//vault: Optional Obsidian vault for Kanban boards, design docs and session notes. Omit or null if you don't use one.
//projects: 'auto' scans `root` for git repos. Or list them explicitly, like below.
//projects2: vault = this project's folder inside the vault. vaultFilter/vaultExclude narrow it when two projects share one vault folder.
